subcodes.first_line: O Solomon! Hearken unto the call of thy Lord, the All-Merciful, from the horizon of sorrows. Verily, there is none other God but Me, the Mighty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا سلیمان ان استمع ندآء ربک الرحمن من افق الاحزان انه لا اله الا انا العزیز
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @chastisement and requital, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
